text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're in the middle of summer camp, and Sakura
Chiyono O is running full speed along the beach.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Pant...
choice_data_list: Try shortening your stride next time!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...Chiyo's really pouring her all into that.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Maruzensky. Are you here on a break?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh—Rudolf... Yes, I'm here on vacation to enjoy
the ocean breeze.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: The view sure is wonderful.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...It certainly is.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
There is much talk around the Classic Triple
Crown. Yaeno Muteki is the favorite for the
Kikuka Sho, while Super Creek is watching keenly
for an opening.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...The public's gaze, however, seems to have
locked firmly on to two particular racers.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Tamamo Cross and Oguri Cap.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It's a battle between the White Lightning who's
overturning conventions left and right through
sheer hard work, and the Beast who shoulders the
dreams of her hometown's people.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap in particular has secured a great deal
of influence, even capturing the hearts of
non-racing fans. Everyone is expecting great
things from her.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
They're both running in the autumn Tenno Sho
this year. I'm sure it will be a race to remember.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
...It's fresh faces like them that make the Twinkle
Series sparkle like it does.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. We are truly experiencing a boom in
races that will help the whole racing world
flourish.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The younger generation has opened the path. Of
course, our own path still lies before us as well.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky. I heard you didn't respond to your
invitation to the Dream Trophy.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The URA would welcome your participation, and
the Dream Trophy focuses less on competition
and more on star power... It seems like a fine
prospect for you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
True, you wouldn't be able to return to the
Twinkle Series, but if you're going to withdraw
from races either way, wouldn't it be best to put
that behind you and—

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...I know, Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That's why I wanted to give all of my secrets—all
of my treasures—to that bright-eyed young racer.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
To pass down all the hopes and dreams I never
managed to fulfill, all wrapped up in a beautiful
ribbon.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to give her everything I could... before I
lose it all.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I thought that if I could just... pass the baton to
someone who looked up to me, I'd be able to
move on...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: And yet... look at me now. And look at her...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... Huff... Trainer... I can keep going...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm still not good enough... Let's keep going...
Please!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O's eyes burn brighter than the
summer sun.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's not the same as she was before the Satsuki
Sho. Her muscles are stronger, and her body's
more resilient. I'm sure she can handle even more
intense training.
choice_data_list: Let's keep running on the beach.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: A sumo match? Really?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Not to brag or anything, but I'm pretty good at
that. I might send you flying...
choice_data_list: You're not wrestling me, of course.
You're not wrestling me, of course.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh? Then who am I wrestling?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Dosukoooi! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Aaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ngh! Hishi Akebono, Tracen's representative
Sumomusume, known for her extraordinary size...
A worthy opponent indeed!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But in sumo, there are no weight classes! Let's do
this! I'll be on the offense this time!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Buono! ♪ I like that look you've got in your eyes!
I'll do my best to help you train!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Thank you! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Slaaaam!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inside a makeshift sumo ring drawn in the sand,
the two racers train and sweat under the shining
sun.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Of course, this isn't just for fun. It'll make great
strength training for her lower body. No doubt
this will lead to more overall power in her races.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Understood. I'll run to my limit—
Whoooooaaa! Can I run with you?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ack! Bamboo? You sprinted over with so much
energy! Like, almost an abnormal amount...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Of course! How could I possibly miss this chance
to run with you?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
W-with me?! But I heard your next race will be on
dirt again. I don't think we'll be able to compete
head-to-head anytime soo—

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's why this is such a rare opportunity! Summer
camp's a great place to meet, run, and train with
strong rivals, regardless of your planned races!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: So please! Race with me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Thank youuuu! Let's goooo!
choice_data_list: Make sure you don't lose, Chiyono O.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hmph! I won't. Just watch me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not wanting to be outdone, Sakura Chiyono O
runs along the beach with Bamboo Memory.
